improvements.title: Require preservation of existing Function App settings
improvements.proposed_prompt_text: When updating Azure Function app settings in Bicep, avoid replacing the full appsettings object. Merge with existing settings (for example using list(...).properties + union(...)) to prevent deleting required keys.
improvements.rationale: Code review found a production risk where required app settings could be removed.

improvements.title: Require explicit region capability handling for zone-redundant resources
improvements.proposed_prompt_text: If acceptance criteria mention zone-redundancy, include an explicit guard or validation strategy for region support in the template (for example assertion/parameter or policy-based check).
improvements.rationale: Code review requested deterministic handling of region capability constraints.

improvements.title: Require CI evidence for infrastructure deployment readiness
improvements.proposed_prompt_text: For infra issues with deployment-related acceptance criteria, add or update CI steps to compile/validate Bicep templates and surface results in PR checks.
improvements.rationale: Code review flagged missing objective evidence for staging deployment readiness.
